chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. S – 103 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.364/2025 (Ex./A) 2. For hearing of main case 13.06.2025 Despite issuance of intimation notice, none present, nor has any intimation been received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing, when urgent application was dismissed. Continuous absence of the petitioner and his Counsel prima facie suggests that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this petition. In view of the above, this petition is dismissed for non- prosecution along with listed application. J U D G E Abdul Basit
